inputs.label: Mesiodistal Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the tooth measured from mesial to distal contact points, typically from dental X-ray or impression.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the tooth measured from mesial to distal contact points, typically from dental X-ray or impression.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dişin meziyal ve distal temas noktaları arasında ölçülen genişlik, genellikle dental röntgen veya ölçüden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite des Zahns gemessen von mesialem zu distalem Kontaktpunkt, typischerweise aus Röntgen oder Abdruck.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur de la dent mesurée du point de contact mésial au point de contact distal, généralement à partir d'une radiographie dentaire ou d'une empreinte.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho del diente medido desde los puntos de contacto mesial y distal, típicamente de una radiografía o impresión dental.

inputs.label: Buccolingual Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the tooth measured from buccal (cheek) to lingual (tongue) surface.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the tooth measured from buccal (cheek) to lingual (tongue) surface.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dişin bukkal (yanak) ve lingual (dil) yüzeyleri arasında ölçülen genişlik.
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite des Zahns gemessen von bukkaler (Wangen-) zu lingualer (Zungen-) Oberfläche.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur de la dent mesurée de la surface buccale (joue) à la surface linguale (langue).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho del diente medido desde la superficie bucal (mejilla) hasta la lingual (lengua).

inputs.label: Crown Length
inputs.businessContext: Distance from the cementoenamel junction to the incisal edge or cusp tip.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance from the cementoenamel junction to the incisal edge or cusp tip.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Semento-mine birleşiminden kesici kenar veya tüberkül tepesine olan mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand von der Schmelz-Zement-Grenze zur Inzisalkante oder Höckerspitze.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance de la jonction cémento-émail au bord incisif ou à la pointe de la cuspide.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia desde la unión cemento-esmalte hasta el borde incisal o punta de la cúspide.

inputs.label: Root Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the root from cementoenamel junction to apex, visible on radiograph.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the root from cementoenamel junction to apex, visible on radiograph.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Semento-mine birleşiminden apeks'e kadar olan kök uzunluğu, radyografide görünür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge der Wurzel von der Schmelz-Zement-Grenze bis zur Apex, sichtbar auf Röntgenbild.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de la racine de la jonction cémento-émail à l'apex, visible sur la radiographie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de la raíz desde la unión cemento-esmalte hasta el ápice, visible en radiografía.

inputs.label: Number of Fully Erupted Permanent Teeth
inputs.businessContext: Count of permanent teeth fully emerged through gingiva and in functional occlusion.

label_i18n.en: Number of Fully Erupted Permanent Teeth
label_i18n.fr: Nombre de dents permanentes complètement éruptées
label_i18n.es: Número de dientes permanentes completamente erupcionados
label_i18n.ar: Number of Fully Erupted Permanent Teeth

businessContext_i18n.en: Count of permanent teeth fully emerged through gingiva and in functional occlusion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Diş etinden tamamen çıkmış ve fonksiyonel oklüzyonda olan daimi diş sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl bleibender Zähne, die vollständig durch das Zahnfleisch getreten sind und in funktioneller Okklusion stehen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de dents permanentes ayant émergé complètement à travers la gencive et en occlusion fonctionnelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Recuento de dientes permanentes que han emergido completamente a través de la encía y están en oclusión funcional.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
